original_name: เป็นต่อ
overview: A successful man at a publishing company tries to rekindle his romance with an ex-girlfriend as those around him also search for love amidst conflict.
name: Pen Tor

original_name: เด็กใหม่
overview: A mysterious, clever girl named Nanno transfers to different schools, exposing the lies and misdeeds of the students and faculty at every turn.
name: Girl from Nowhere

original_name: ซาวด์เช็ก
overview: Zani and Tum host a series of talks with their celebrity guests interspersed with live musical performances.
name: Sound Check

original_name: รอยรัก วันวาน
overview: To reclaim his legacy, a betrayed heir teams up with an old ally to battle a ruthless half-brother now ruling a massive business empire.
name: Yesterday

original_name: เพราะรักนำทาง
overview: Four friends navigate college life and chaotic romances as they each find their hearts entangled with medical students across four unique stories.
name: Fourever You

original_name: มีสติหน่อยคุณธีร์
overview: An introverted photographer's life changes when a former mafia boss hires him for love advice, only to end up falling for him instead."
name: Me and Thee

original_name: ไหนเฮียบอกไม่ชอบเด็ก
overview: Jun loves to annoy Sorn. Sorn can't stand Jun. But fate has plans—and maybe feelings—they didn’t see coming.
name: My Stubborn

original_name: คลั่ง/รัก/นักโทษ
overview: Fate led Bell, an unfortunate young woman, into prison, where she had to struggle for survival alone, without hope. That was until Claire, a mysterious female inmate, appeared to help her. And from that moment on... the encounter between these two souls began to fill this dark and desolate place with a small glimmer of light, one that gradually grew into love.
name: ClaireBell

original_name: นักร้องซ่อนแอบ
overview: Thailand version of the reality singing competition where g celebrities must correctly guess a real singer, based on appearance and a few hints only.
name: I Can See Your Voice Thailand

original_name: รักโคตรร้าย สุดท้ายโคตรรัก
overview: Porsche agrees to guard mafia heir Kinn for his family's sake, but fighting off danger soon turns into fighting his own feelings.
name: KinnPorsche: The Series

original_name: เขมจิราต้องรอด
overview: With a deadly curse set to claim him at 21, a young man flees to a master of ancient magic—only to face ghosts more dangerous than his fate.
name: Khemjira

original_name: ไขคดีเป็น เห็นคดีตาย
overview: When seven college students find themselves trapped in a deadly game, two detectives compete to find the killer — even as their attraction grows.
name: Dare You to Death

original_name: ด้วงกับเธอ
overview: After a festival confession, art student Duang sets out to win over a guarded music major, slowly turning first love into a safe haven for them both.
name: Duang With You

original_name: พิษเบ๊บ เดอะ ซีรีส์
overview: Babe, a race car driver with unmatched talent, falls for newcomer Charlie, but hidden secrets threaten their passionate romance and racing dreams.
name: Pit Babe

original_name: เสือ ชะนี เก้ง
overview: Three BFFs live in the same condominium building and face life and love together. Tum, a playboy photographer who doesn’t believe in true love because his girlfriend left him with a luxury condominium to pay off alone. Oil, Tum’s friend, offers to help him find a roommate to share the rent. Turns out the new roommate is Cheetah aka Chatree, Tum’s gay friend who used to be secretly in love with him. Tum cut off his friendship with Cheetah a long time ago because Cheetah tricked him to believe that he was straight.
name: Suea Chani Keng

original_name: ข้ามฟ้าเคียงเธอ
overview: When a reluctant heir is called to compete in a tournament to decide the next king, the royal guard sent to escort him soon becomes his forbidden desire.
name: The Next Prince

original_name: เชฟกระทะเหล็ก ประเทศไทย
overview: เชฟกระทะเหล็ก ประเทศไทย เป็นเกมโชว์การทำอาหาร ออกอากาศทุกวันพุธ เวลา 23.00 น. - 01.00 น. โดยเริ่มอากาศครั้งแรกเมื่อวันพุธที่ 25 มกราคม พ.ศ. 2555 ทางสถานีโทรทัศน์สีกองทัพบกช่อง 7 ตามรูปแบบของรายการ ยุทธการกระทะเหล็ก ที่ออกอากาศครั้งแรกวันที่ 10 ตุลาคม พ.ศ. 2536 โดยได้รับลิขสิทธิ์จากบริษัท ฟูจิ ครีเอทีฟ คอร์ปอเรชั่น จำกัด ประเทศญี่ปุ่น โดยได้รับลิขสิทธิ์ในการผลิตรายการนี้ ในอีกหลายภาษา
name: Iron Chef Thailand

original_name: บรรยากาศรัก เดอะซีรีส์
overview: Rain plots to make Phayu fall for him to ruin his reputation, while Sky grapples with his feelings for Prapai, in this whirlwind of emotions and growing love.
name: Love In The Air

original_name: เขาจ้างให้ผมจีบนักฆ่า
overview: A mission to expose two assassin brothers spirals when Kant’s feelings for one of them threaten to blow his cover—and maybe more.
name: The Heart Killers

original_name: ฮอร์โมนส์ วัยว้าวุ่น
overview: High school students in Bangkok wrestle with issues such as sex, teen pregnancy, drugs, school violence, family turmoil and more in this Thai drama.
name: Hormones
